gradients.gold_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#C6A87C] via-[#E5CFA0] to-[#C6A87C]

grid_system.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-x-8 gap-y-16
grid_system.hero_section: h-screen w-full flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-medium transition-all focus-visible:outline-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.primary: bg-[#C6A87C] text-black hover:bg-[#E5CFA0] uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none
variants.outline: border border-[#C6A87C] text-[#C6A87C] hover:bg-[#C6A87C] hover:text-black uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none

ProductCard.image: h-full w-full object-cover object-center transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110
ProductCard.title: text-lg font-serif text-white

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full border-b border-white/20 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:border-[#C6A87C] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 rounded-none transition-colors

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text over images has 'dark_overlay' or text-shadow. Gold text must be on dark backgrounds only.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring using standard Tailwind focus classes (focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C6A87C]).
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (search, cart, menu).

media.image_strategy: Use high-contrast, cinematic photography with deep blacks. Jewelry should sparkle. Avoid flat white backgrounds unless necessary for product isolation.

hero.alt: Elegant model wearing luxury gold jewelry on black background

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Bodoni Moda' from Google Fonts for headings. Ensure it is imported in index.css.
Set the global theme to DARK mode by default in tailwind.config.js or index.css.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the homepage categories section.
Ensure all buttons have sharp edges (rounded-none) to match the luxury aesthetic.
The 'Custom Request' form should handle file uploads (mocked if backend not ready) and show a preview.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. DO NOT use generic placeholders.
Although the user mentioned Angular/Java, you are working in a React/FastAPI environment. Build the Frontend in React but structure the services to be compatible with a REST API.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (backdrop-blur-md) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (p-12, p-24).
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can enhance the luxury feel.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
